templateId.description: Stable id used by `engine new` when cloning this template.

summary.description: One-sentence pitch — what kind of game this template starts from.

gameplayVocabulary.description: Short list of domain terms the project uses (e.g. `core`, `beacon`, `hazard`). Helps agents map agent-author requests to project entities.

files.description: Files an agent typically edits when working at this extension point.

extensionPoints.description: Safe places to extend: where to add components, systems, materials, playtests. Each entry tells an agent which file(s) to open.

templateContextFile.description: Path (relative to project root) to a free-form Markdown brief. Defaults to template_context.md.
